narrative:
Ruben Vargas is a Left Winger for Switzerland, currently boasting an overall rating of 7.25/10. This places him among the top 5% of left wingers competing at this tournament. His rating range is 6.85–7.65, reflecting the match sample size.

Vargas has been highly effective in this World Cup, contributing 0.723 goals and 0.361 assists per 90 minutes across 249 minutes played. He also generates 2.892 key passes per 90 minutes, indicating strong creative output. This World Cup form contrasts with his club level output of 0.165 goals and 0.28 assists per 90 minutes over the last two seasons, despite 55% of his rating coming from club form.

Vargas is clearly a crucial attacking threat for Switzerland, driving significant offensive contributions. Scouts and fans should observe if he can maintain his impressive World Cup scoring and assisting rates. His ability to consistently deliver such high output will be key in the remaining matches.
